policy_result.reason: Changes to authentication, compliance, or payment logic carry elevated risk and require human review before merge.

evidence: PR modifies compliance-sensitive path matching TicketDeflection/Services/Compliance*
Policy action sensitive_app_change matched via corrected glob patterns
Agent requested adding a new AUTO_BLOCK rule to FINTRAC set

CORRECTION: Original artifact claimed match via TicketDeflection/**/Compliance/** which was provably false — File.fnmatch? returned false because no literal Compliance/ directory exists in the path. Policy updated to include TicketDeflection/Services/Compliance* glob. This replacement artifact reflects the corrected match.
summary: New FINTRAC AUTO_BLOCK rule addition queued for human review — compliance-sensitive path. (Corrected: original glob mismatch fixed.)
correction_reason: Original artifact evidence[0] claimed match via TicketDeflection/**/Compliance/** glob, but File.fnmatch? with FNM_PATHNAME returns false for TicketDeflection/Services/ComplianceRuleLibrary.cs against that pattern. The glob requires a literal Compliance/ directory segment which does not exist. Policy has been updated with explicit file-level patterns.
